lenses.name: Pre-mortem
lenses.prompt: Assume the outcome failed; identify evidence-backed causes and earlier controls.

lenses.name: Adversarial review
lenses.prompt: Challenge claims, boundaries, and happy-path assumptions using contrary evidence.

lenses.name: Edge-case hunt
lenses.prompt: Find boundary values, empty states, races, retries, partial failures, and uncommon actors.

lenses.name: Stakeholder conflict
lenses.prompt: Expose incompatible goals, incentives, permissions, and ownership expectations.

lenses.name: Reversibility check
lenses.prompt: Test rollback, migration, data recovery, compatibility, and decision reversibility.

lenses.name: Abuse-case review
lenses.prompt: Identify misuse, privilege, trust-boundary, validation, and data-exposure paths.

lenses.name: Operational failure review
lenses.prompt: Challenge observability, degradation, dependency failure, recovery, and operator response.

lenses.name: Assumption challenge
lenses.prompt: Locate unsupported, stale, hidden, or mutually inconsistent assumptions.
